zh.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth是Cynarth ap Herbert和Unknown的女兒，於大約1190年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。她和Rhys Gôch ap Richard至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1281年在英國英格蘭波克夏溫莎女爵享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth是Cynarth ap Herbert和Unknown的女儿，于大约1190年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根。她和Rhys Gôch ap Richard至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1281年在英国英格兰波克夏溫莎女爵享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth was born about 1190, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Cynarth ap Herbert and Unknown. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Rhys Gôch ap Richard. She died in 1281, in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth est née environ 1190, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Cynarth ap Herbert et Unknown. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Rhys Gôch ap Richard. Elle est décédée en 1281, à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth wurde um 1190 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Cynarth ap Herbert und Unknown geboren. Sie hatte mit Rhys Gôch ap Richard mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1281 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Windsor, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth è nata il circa 1190 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Cynarth ap Herbert e Unknown. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Rhys Gôch ap Richard. Morì nel 1281, nel Windsor, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarthは約1190年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでCynarth ap HerbertとUnknownの娘として生まれた。彼女はRhys Gôch ap Richardとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1281年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth(은)는 대략 1190년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Cynarth ap Herbert(와)과 Unknown의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Rhys Gôch ap Richard(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 윈드소르에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Cynarth ap Herbert e Unknown. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Rhys Gôch ap Richard. Ela faleceu em 1281, em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth родилась около 1190 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Cynarth ap Herbert и Unknown. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Rhys Gôch ap Richard. Она умерла в 1281 г. в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Cynarth nació aproximadamente 1190, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Cynarth ap Herbert y Unknown. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Rhys Gôch ap Richard. Murió en 1281, en Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 92 años.
